plan_name: Tool Result Matching and Retroactive Decomposition

tasks.name: Add tool_result UPDATE to decompose_content_block in decompose.rs
tasks.notes: Added UPDATE tool_executions SET result_content, is_error WHERE tool_use_id in ToolResult arm. Test verifies round-trip assistant tool_use -> user tool_result matching.

tasks.name: Add retroactive artifact decomposition function and integrate into sync_all
tasks.notes: Added decompose_artifacts_retroactive() querying existing tool_executions for Write/Edit/Read/Bash tools, dispatching to extract_* functions. Integrated into sync_all after FTS rebuild with non-fatal error handling.
